meaning: n.<美>(尤指牛的) 血镁过少 ,低镁症
examples: In most cases reviewed the patients did not continue on PPIs after the hypomagnesemia was treated.
The frequency of hypomagnesemia in DDP group increased with the degree of alimentary duct toxities.
Because hypomagnesemia is a risk factor for POAF, the magnesium level should be monitored postoperatively and corrected if low.
